editor.blueprint.fallbackDescription: This node is ready for field-driven configuration.
editor.canvas.subtitle: Drag to position nodes, connect outputs into inputs, or drop a link on empty space to create the next compatible node in place.
editor.canvas.title: Node canvas
editor.contextMenu.noCompatibleNodes: No compatible node types can complete this connection.
editor.contextMenu.noNodesAvailable: No nodes are available in the current library.
editor.edgeInspector.edgeDescription: This link routes {sourceHandle} from {sourceLabel} into {targetHandle} on {targetLabel}.
editor.footer.summary: This refit keeps the existing session workflow intact: add nodes from the library, wire them on the canvas, inspect field values on the right, then submit the finished graph.
editor.graphDefaults.description: A new node graph session created by NodeGraph.
editor.graphDefaults.name: {domain} flow
editor.header.fallbackDescription: Build and review the current session graph here, then push the final document back through the completion webhook.
editor.runtime.invalidGraphSummary: {count} invalid items need attention before the graph can run.
editor.runtime.libraryRefreshFailed: Library refresh failed. Try again after checking the runtime host.
editor.inspector.description: Adjust graph metadata, edit local settings, and inspect the currently selected node or link without leaving the canvas workflow.
editor.inspector.edgeStyleDescription: Change how existing and newly created links are drawn on the canvas without affecting the saved graph structure.
editor.inspector.emptySelection: Select a node or link on the canvas to inspect its details here.
editor.inspector.fallbackNodeDescription: This node is ready for field-level adjustments.
editor.inspector.graphHint: Use the graph tab for session-level naming and summary text. Node and link details stay in the adjacent selection tab.
editor.inspector.languageDescription: Switch built-in editor copy plus node-library, port, and field-template presentation.
editor.inspector.settingsDescription: These preferences are stored only in this browser. They control editor language and edge styling, and are never written into the graph document.
editor.inspector.title: Inspector
editor.library.description: Search domain nodes, compare categories, and drop building blocks straight onto the canvas.
editor.library.emptySearch: No node types match the current search term.
editor.library.searchPlaceholder: Search node types, categories, or labels
editor.library.title: Node library
editor.save.failed: The completion webhook failed. Adjust the data and try again.
